gates.description: SSI import must not emit fallback blocks.
SSI/BFB diagnostics must not include actionable conversion findings.
Visual parity artifact must report no mismatches or delta.
Reviewer evidence must use durable candidate, validation, visual, finding, and revalidation artifact references; GitHub URLs are optional publication evidence.

metadata.description: WPSG-owned domain ingredient contract for generating a static-site candidate, validating it through Static Site Importer, routing finding groups, revalidating, and publishing only when quality metrics clear.

randomness_profile.description: Low variance; deterministic enough for stable importer proof.

policy_results.reason: no recent quality signals; using current/default tier

tier.description: Simple, single-purpose sites that prove core importer stability.
tier.prompt_guidance: Prefer simple static structure, common Gutenberg-compatible sections, low animation, and minimal bespoke interaction.

metadata.title: Static Site Importer self-improving site-generation loop

metrics.description: Fallback block count reported by SSI import validation.
Actionable conversion finding count reported by SSI/BFB diagnostics.
Visual parity status, mismatch count, and maximum delta ratio.
Durable candidate, validation, visual parity, finding, and revalidation evidence references for the reviewer gate.
